refnamediv.refpurpose: Reverse Yate's algorithm to give estimated responses

listitem.para: a n-by-1 vector of doubles, containing average response, main effects and interaction effects. ef(1) is the average response and ef(2:$) contain the main effects and interaction effects.
a n-by-1 vector of doubles, the estimated response given the effects.
a (n-1)-by-k matrix of doubles, identification matrix of main and interaction effects.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Reverse Yate's algorithm to give estimated responses
This function is adapted from the Wafo toolbox:

refsection.title: Examples
Bibliography
refsection.para: Box, G.E.P, Hunter, W.G. and Hunter, J.S. (1978)
Statistics for experimenters, John Wiley & Sons, pp 342
